rulings.Case Title: SURE BUILDING PRODUCTS, INC. et al VS. TCC STEEL, A KOREAN COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH O5, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT DONGYANG AMERICA, INC., BONG-RAK SOHN, JUNWON SOHN, CHU-HYUK YOON, NAM-CHUNG CHO, T.C.C. STEEL'S DEMURRER TO THE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD UNDER THE COMMERCIAL CODE. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTH, FIFTH, SEVENTH AND EIGHTH CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS KYUNG-CHAE PARK, CHU-HYUK YOON, NAM-CHUNG CHO AND YONG SIG BIN. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND THE SIXTH AND NINTH CAUSES OF ACTION. OVERRULE THE DEMURRER TO THE FOURTH, FIFTH, SEVENTH AND EIGHTH CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST THE SOHN DEFENDANTS. STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANTS NOT CHARGED WITH FRAUD. =(302/PJM/AP)
